TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: aicu ti Kuo Hsing-Chun (ciniukukan:ťÉ≠Ś©ěś∑≥Ôľõinamizukuan:Tana) mavan a unduin nase ŤąČťáć nua aya. nalemedaw kemasi imaza i yilan king. timadju kemasi imaza i taitu i valangaw a qinaljan uta. na kitjuala kemasi i na pakata undu kaucung a gaku kitjeljc sihu taitu daigaku katua nase tinsiukiu kuzing a vuren daigaku itua undu a tatuluan . avan sika tucu namasan tua huciawsu imaza i vuren daigaku se undu a tatuluan. timadju namalap tua liawliaw a pazangal a tjaljavavavan a pakaleva nase paqaqayam a ŤąČťáć, parutua ka 2020 a caviljan aulingpiya undukai imaza i ripun i tukiyu, na kialap tua sangasangasan a pakaleva pakata ŤąČťáć nase vavayan a 59 a kinasadjelung katua mareka paqaqayam imaza i kacauan. ka 2017 a caviljan timajdu na paselaw tjaljavavavan a tinsu izua 142 a kinasadjelung itua śĆļŤąČ, namsan ta sangasangasan a tinsu se vavayan a unduin i kacauan tuazua. ka tjaivililj ta 2018 a caviljan patje tucu timadju mavananga tjaljasangasangasan a unduin nasevavayan namalap tua vavavan a tinsu pakata 59 a kinasadjelung itua śäďŤąČ, śĆļŤąČ, katua penuljat a tinsu matja tjelu a ť†ÖÁõģ i kacauan. kipalikuzan == pakaleva ==
S.PHON: ai ¶u ti kuu hsiŇč- ¶hun ( ¶iniukukan:****inamizukuan:tana) mavan a unduin nas…ô ** nua aja. na…≠…ôm…ôdaw k…ômasi imaza i ji…≠an kiŇč. tima…Ču k…ômasi imaza i taitu i va…≠aŇčaw a qina éan uta. na ki ¶ua…≠a k…ômasi i na pakata undu kau ¶uŇč a gaku ki ¶…ô é ¶ sihu taitu daigaku katua nas…ô tinsiukiu kuziŇč a vur…ôn daigaku itua undu a tatu…≠uan . avan sika tu ¶u namasan tua hu ¶iawsu imaza i vur…ôn daigaku s…ô undu a tatu…≠uan. tima…Ču nama…≠ap tua …≠iaw…≠iaw a pazaŇča…≠ a ¶a éavavavan a paka…≠…ôva nas…ô paqaqajam a **, parutua ka **** a ¶avi éan au…≠iŇčpija undukai imaza i ripun i tukiju, na kia…≠ap tua saŇčasaŇčasan a paka…≠…ôva pakata ** nas…ô vavajan a ** a kinasa…Č…ô…≠uŇč katua mar…ôka paqaqajam imaza i ka ¶auan. ka **** a ¶avi éan timajdu na pas…ô…≠aw ¶a éavavavan a tinsu izua *** a kinasa…Č…ô…≠uŇč itua **, namsan ta saŇčasaŇčasan a tinsu s…ô vavajan a unduin i ka ¶auan tuazua. ka ¶aivi…≠i é ta **** a ¶avi éan pa ¶…ô tu ¶u tima…Ču mavanaŇča ¶a éasaŇčasaŇčasan a unduin nas…ôvavajan nama…≠ap tua vavavan a tinsu pakata ** a kinasa…Č…ô…≠uŇč itua **, **, katua p…ônu éat a tinsu ma ¶a ¶…ô…≠u a ** i ka ¶auan. kipa…≠ikuzan == paka…≠…ôva ==
S.FORM: aicu ti Kuo Hsing-Chun (ciniukukan:ťÉ≠Ś©ěś∑≥Ôľõinamizukuan:Tana) mavan a unduin nase ŤąČťáć nua aya. nalemedaw kemasi imaza i yilan king. timadju kemasi imaza i taitu i valangaw a qinaljan uta. na kitjuala kemasi i na pakata undu kaucung a gaku kitjeljc sihu taitu daigaku katua nase tinsiukiu kuzing a vuren daigaku itua undu a tatuluan . avan sika tucu namasan tua huciawsu imaza i vuren daigaku se undu a tatuluan. timadju namalap tua liawliaw a pazangal a tjaljavavavan a pakaleva nase paqaqayam a ŤąČťáć, parutua ka 2020 a caviljan aulingpiya undukai imaza i ripun i tukiyu, na kialap tua sangasangasan a pakaleva pakata ŤąČťáć nase vavayan a 59 a kinasadjelung katua mareka paqaqayam imaza i kacauan. ka 2017 a caviljan timajdu na paselaw tjaljavavavan a tinsu izua 142 a kinasadjelung itua śĆļŤąČ, namsan ta sangasangasan a tinsu se vavayan a unduin i kacauan tuazua. ka tjaivililj ta 2018 a caviljan patje tucu timadju mavananga tjaljasangasangasan a unduin nasevavayan namalap tua vavavan a tinsu pakata 59 a kinasadjelung itua śäďŤąČ, śĆļŤąČ, katua penuljat a tinsu matja tjelu a ť†ÖÁõģ i kacauan. kipalikuzan == pakaleva ==
S.PHON: ai ¶u ti kuu hsiŇč- ¶hun ( ¶iniukukan:****inamizukuan:tana) mavan a unduin nas…ô ** nua aja. na…≠…ôm…ôdaw k…ômasi imaza i ji…≠an kiŇč. tima…Ču k…ômasi imaza i taitu i va…≠aŇčaw a qina éan uta. na ki ¶ua…≠a k…ômasi i na pakata undu kau ¶uŇč a gaku ki ¶…ô é ¶ sihu taitu daigaku katua nas…ô tinsiukiu kuziŇč a vur…ôn daigaku itua undu a tatu…≠uan . avan sika tu ¶u namasan tua hu ¶iawsu imaza i vur…ôn daigaku s…ô undu a tatu…≠uan. tima…Ču nama…≠ap tua …≠iaw…≠iaw a pazaŇča…≠ a ¶a éavavavan a paka…≠…ôva nas…ô paqaqajam a **, parutua ka **** a ¶avi éan au…≠iŇčpija undukai imaza i ripun i tukiju, na kia…≠ap tua saŇčasaŇčasan a paka…≠…ôva pakata ** nas…ô vavajan a ** a kinasa…Č…ô…≠uŇč katua mar…ôka paqaqajam imaza i ka ¶auan. ka **** a ¶avi éan timajdu na pas…ô…≠aw ¶a éavavavan a tinsu izua *** a kinasa…Č…ô…≠uŇč itua **, namsan ta saŇčasaŇčasan a tinsu s…ô vavajan a unduin i ka ¶auan tuazua. ka ¶aivi…≠i é ta **** a ¶avi éan pa ¶…ô tu ¶u tima…Ču mavanaŇča ¶a éasaŇčasaŇčasan a unduin nas…ôvavajan nama…≠ap tua vavavan a tinsu pakata ** a kinasa…Č…ô…≠uŇč itua **, **, katua p…ônu éat a tinsu ma ¶a ¶…ô…≠u a ** i ka ¶auan. kipa…≠ikuzan == paka…≠…ôva ==
